topic: Anatomy of a Findings Report: What a Real Document Audit Looks Like
reasoning: Keyword 'third-party plan review' does not contain 'alternatives'/'alternative to' (rule 1), does not contain 'vs'/'versus'/'or' between two product names (rule 2), does not contain 'pricing'/'cost'/'price'/'how much' (rule 3), does not contain 'free trial'/'discount'/'coupon'/'promo code' (rule 5). It also does not match the review rule (rule 4): it is a generic service-category term (Tier 1 hire-me intent) that does not name a specific product or vendor, so per DECISION_TYPES.md's explicit guidance ('Does NOT match generic service-category terms that merely contain the word review') it falls through. Falls through to rule 6 (informational default) -> blog/prompts/daily-post.md.
